name: Error Pattern Learning
description: Tests whether debugging a bug in Session 1 leads to faster resolution of a similar bug in Session 2. With brain memory, the agent should recall the prior debugging insight and apply it directly.

memories.title: Race Condition in Async Map
memories.body: Found a race condition when using Promise.all with map over an array that modifies shared state. Each callback was reading stale data because the array was mutated during iteration. Fix: use a sequential for...of loop instead of parallel map when mutations are involved, or take a snapshot of the array first.

test.label: fix-similar-bug
test.text: There's a bug in processor.js — the processAll function sometimes returns fewer results than expected when processing large arrays. The issue is intermittent and only shows up under load. Find the bug, explain what causes it, and fix both processAll and processInBatches.
